source_name: PCRS Druglist (HSE Primary Care Reimbursement Service)
manual_refresh_reason: Spring/Netscaler-protected SPA: download requires submitting the search form (with All Items category) in a real browser, then clicking Download on the results page. Automated POSTs are returned 403 Access Denied.
notes: Published column 'Reimbursement Price' is the ingredient cost as defined in S.I. 639/2019: ex-factory price + 8% wholesale mark-up (12% for fridge items). Excludes VAT and pharmacy markup/dispensing fee. See decisions/003.

Multi-sheet XLSX. Sheet A1 (Leki refundowane dostępne w aptece) is primary. Each row has four published price columns: Cena zbytu netto (manufacturer net, excl. VAT) -> manufacturer_price; Urzędowa cena zbytu (official sale, net + VAT) -> manufacturer_price with VAT; Cena hurtowa brutto (wholesale gross, incl. VAT) -> pharmacy_purchase_price; Cena detaliczna (retail) -> public_retail_price. Polish decimal separator is comma.

Public SCAU list captured from the SÚKL cau-scau API. Key fields include cenaPuvodce (manufacturer ex-VAT), maxCenaLekarna (maximum pharmacy price incl. VAT/margins), uhrada, kodSUKL, ATCkod, sila, lekovaFormaKod, and baleni.
Full Nomenclator Excel export captured from metodo=nomenclatorExcel. Uses 'Precio de venta al público con IVA' as public_retail_price; delegate filters non-medicine rows without Tipo de fármaco.

source_name: AIFA Classe A per principio attivo
notes: AIFA CSV captured from the public Class A per active ingredient download. Uses 'Prezzo al pubblico' as public_retail_price.

manual_refresh_reason: Infomed is a JSF search application; capture is treated as an internal research extract with query/export evidence rather than a republished bulk database.
notes: Infomed contains medicine name, active substance/DCI, dosage, pharmaceutical form, presentations, PVP and reimbursement rate. Terms say use is free and registration-free; downstream database reproduction/distribution requires Infarmed authorization, so raw extracts are kept as internal research evidence. Current snapshot is a targeted research extract for selected biologics, not a full national bulk capture.

manual_refresh_reason: Monthly workbook captured into a dated snapshot and verified locally.
notes: SPB_PRICE is the observed ex-factory price in the SSP PRICE_COMPARISON sheet; first pass uses manufacturer_price only.
